title: refine: address Pulse v1 scope PR review feedback

Tighten design loading-state guidance.
close_reason: Applied PR #1 scope review fixes: rewrote README for Pulse with bun, removed stale git-remote blocker lines, added Effect v4 beta risk acknowledgment, pre-resolved scope gaps (media-by-URL, cursor pagination, URL dedup, feedback mutability, retention, ingest token rotation, rate limiting), tightened design loading-state and media constraints. Validation passed: bunx tsc --noEmit, bunx biome format ., bun run lint.

close_reason: Anvil review binding now uses local review with no external Greptile backend.

title: feat: define Pulse curated signal feed
description:
Source summary:
You are helping me build Pulse.

Pulse is my private “Twitter-like” signal feed where Layla, my AI assistant, is the only poster. The goal is not a social network or generic read-it-later app. It is a high-signal curated feed of things I should inspect: technical discoveries, library releases, articles, tweets/threads, videos, ad business/news, Skydeo-relevant market intelligence, tools, workflows, and strategic observations.

Core product idea:
- Layla finds something worth my attention.
- Layla creates a compact recommendation card.
- I read/inspect it.
- I give lightweight feedback.
- Feedback improves Layla’s future curation taste.

Pulse should answer:
“What should Seif know or inspect today, and why?” 

The project UI should be inspired from https://www.effect.institute, https://www.effect.solutions, and https://www.kitlangton.com. It should be mobile first and optimized for touch based devices.

I should be able to manually add feed items too.

Channel:
chat

Captured at:
2026-05-18

Captured by:
user

Context:
User is building Pulse. References provided by user: https://www.effect.institute, https://www.effect.solutions, https://www.kitlangton.com.

Acceptance:
Not defined during intake.

References:
https://www.effect.institute
https://www.effect.solutions
https://www.kitlangton.com

title: Configure Anvil workflow files
description: Set up Anvil bindings, templates, shared rules, and readiness cache for this repository using beads, graphite, greptile, local markdown artifacts, and scripted validation.
close_reason: Anvil workflow files were written under .claude; readiness cache records blocked external checks for missing git remote, Greptile registration, and test script.
